requirements_addressed: All 8 smoke BDD scenarios covered by integration tests
Key negative cases tested (missing config, domain, GOAL.md, empty ChromaDB)
Tests run with mocked external dependencies
All tests pass with pytest tests/ -v -m smoke
Test fixtures provide reusable config, domain, and agent setup

completion_promises.criterion_text: All 8 smoke BDD scenarios covered by integration tests
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/test_integration_smoke.py with 12 test classes covering all 8 @smoke BDD scenarios: (1) TestLoadValidConfig - config loading with all sections, (2) TestStructuredLogging - JSON logging active + level set, (3) TestLangSmithProject - env var set from domain, (4) TestDomainResolution - domain path resolved, (5) TestGoalMdParsing - GOAL.md parsed with targets available, (6) TestChromaDBVerification - collection verified, (7) TestFullStartupSequence - full pipeline with agents+tools+generation loop, (8) TestGenerationLoopPlayerCoachCycle - Player-Coach accept and reject-revise cycles. All 18 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Key negative cases tested (missing config, domain, GOAL.md, empty ChromaDB)
completion_promises.evidence: Four negative test classes: TestMissingConfig (FileNotFoundError for missing agent-config.yaml), TestNonExistentDomain (DomainNotFoundError for missing domain dir), TestMissingGoalMd (FileNotFoundError for missing GOAL.md), TestEmptyChromaDB (RuntimeError with ingestion suggestion for empty collection). All 4 negative tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests run with mocked external dependencies (no real LLM/ChromaDB needed)
completion_promises.evidence: All tests use unittest.mock: ChromaDB client is MagicMock with configurable count(), LLM agents are AsyncMock with predetermined responses (accept/reject verdicts as JSON), agent.py functions patched via patch.object(). No real LLM or ChromaDB connections needed. Tests run in <1 second.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All tests pass with pytest tests/ -v -m smoke
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'pytest tests/test_integration_smoke.py -v -m smoke' — all 18 tests passed. Also verified full suite (1507 tests) passes with zero failures. Added 'tests' to pyproject.toml testpaths so 'pytest tests/ -v -m smoke' discovers the tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test fixtures provide reusable config, domain, and agent setup
completion_promises.evidence: Seven reusable pytest fixtures defined: config_dict (valid YAML as dict), config_yaml_path (writes YAML to tmp_path), agent_config (validated AgentConfig), domain_dir (creates domain directory with valid GOAL.md), mock_chromadb_collection, mock_chromadb_client, generation_target, generation_config. Three helper functions: _make_accept_verdict_json, _make_reject_verdict_json, _make_mock_agent_response.
